subject: feat(types): add database types and gen:types script
body:
Hand-written Database interface matching Supabase schema (tables, views,
functions) until Docker is available for `supabase gen types typescript`.
Added npm run gen:types script for regenerating from live schema.

Tags: types, supabase, tooling
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
